chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal Nos. 143, 144 & 145 of 2022 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of main case. 2. For hearing of CMA No. 1066/22. 01.12.2025 None present for the Appellants. Mr. Ali Haider, advocate holding brief for Mr. Kashif Hanif, advocate for respondent. Mr. Mukesh Kumar Khatri, advocate for respondent. Ms. Zehrah Sehr Vayani, Assistant Attorney General. Mr. Raja Love Kush, Deputy Manager (Legal), SSGC. These appeals are pending since 2022. Appellants remain unrepresented today without intimation or justification. It appears that the appellants are not interested in proceeding with these appeals, therefore, the same are dismissed for non-prosecution. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in the connected files. Judge Judge Ayaz P.S.
